column4: 1. Display welcome screen on first app launch
2. Provide system overview and disclaimer before account creation
3. Allow new users to register using email and password
4. Validate email format and enforce password strength rules
5. Allow users to register using Google authentication
6. Provide secure login screen for registered users
7. Enable login using email and password
9. Display error messages for invalid login attempts
10. Allow users to reset forgotten passwords via email link
12. Provide option to enable Multi-Factor Authentication
13. Enable MFA via email or SMS verification
15. Allow users to create multiple pet profiles.
16. Capture pet details: Name, Age, Breed, Weight
23. Show past symptoms and risk levels.
30. Convert natural language to structured symptom data.
32. Display AI explanation of suspected disease.
34. Link symptoms to specific pet profile.
36. Send symptom data to FastAPI ML service.
40. If Low Risk -> Recommend home monitoring.
41. If Medium Risk -> Recommend vet visit within 48 hours.
42. If High Risk -> Recommend vet visit within 24 hours (Emergency).
44. Attach prediction to pet health history.
45. Use LangGraph to analyze prediction + pet history.
48. Trigger clinic recommendation when risk is Medium or High.
50. Rank clinics based on urgency & distance.
55. Fetch nearby clinics using Google Maps API.
63. Allow users to record completed vaccinations.
66. Send push notifications for due vaccines.
67. Alert users if vaccine-preventable disease risk detected.
68. Send emergency notification for high-risk cases.
69. Notify user of recommended vet visit urgency.
73. Remind users for follow-up vet visit.
88. Enable AI model updates without downtime
89. Allow users to rate prediction accuracy (Helpful / Not Helpful).
